headline: A Look At PACCAR (PCAR) Valuation After Q1 2026 Earnings And Dividend Increase
summary: Why PACCAR’s latest earnings and dividend move matter for investors PACCAR (PCAR) just paired its first quarter 2026 earnings update with a higher regular dividend, a combination that puts profitability, capital allocation and income potential in focus for anyone tracking the stock. See our latest analysis for PACCAR.
